    def test_logout(driver):
        home = HomePage(driver)
        home.click_signup_login()

        assert "Logged in as" in check_Login
    
        WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(
            EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.LINK_TEXT, "Logout"))
        ).click()
